query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS advisory_reports (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
  reportType ENUM('COMPLIANCE_ASSESSMENT', 'STANDARDS_MAPPING', 'REGULATION_IMPACT', 'IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE', 'GAP_ANALYSIS', 'SECTOR_ADVISORY', 'CUSTOM') NOT NULL,
  executiveSummary TEXT,
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  findings JSON,
  recommendations JSON,
  targetRegulationIds JSON,
  targetStandardIds JSON,
  sectorTags JSON,
  gs1ImpactTags JSON,
  version VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  generatedDate TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  generatedBy VARCHAR(255),
  llmModel VARCHAR(128),
  generationPrompt TEXT,
  qualityScore DECIMAL(3, 2),
  reviewStatus ENUM('DRAFT', 'UNDER_REVIEW', 'APPROVED', 'PUBLISHED', 'ARCHIVED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT',
  reviewedBy VARCHAR(255),
  reviewedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  reviewNotes TEXT,
  publicationStatus ENUM('INTERNAL_ONLY', 'READY_FOR_PUBLICATION', 'PUBLISHED', 'WITHDRAWN') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'INTERNAL_ONLY',
  laneStatus ENUM('LANE_A', 'LANE_B', 'LANE_C') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'LANE_C',
  governanceNotes TEXT,
  viewCount INT DEFAULT 0,
  downloadCount INT DEFAULT 0,
  lastAccessedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX reportType_idx (reportType),
  INDEX reviewStatus_idx (reviewStatus),
  INDEX publicationStatus_idx (publicationStatus),
  INDEX generatedDate_idx (generatedDate)
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 31QbGTVHxF7ThTp.root --database cozU6EotfgGjqPV9552owj --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS advisory_reports (

  executiveSummary TEXT,

  targetStandardIds JSON,
  sectorTags JSON,
  gs1ImpactTags JSON,
  version VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  generatedDate TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  generatedBy VARCHAR(255),
  llmModel VARCHAR(128),
  generationPrompt TEXT,
  qualityScore DECIMAL(3, 2),
  reviewStatus ENUM('DRAFT', 'UNDER_REVIEW', 'APPROVED', 'PUBLISHED', 'ARCHIVED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT',
  reviewedBy VARCHAR(255),
  reviewedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  reviewNotes TEXT,
  publicationStatus ENUM('INTERNAL_ONLY', 'READY_FOR_PUBLICATION', 'PUBLISHED', 'WITHDRAWN') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'INTERNAL_ONLY',
  laneStatus ENUM('LANE_A', 'LANE_B', 'LANE_C') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'LANE_C',
  governanceNotes TEXT,
  viewCount INT DEFAULT 0,
  downloadCount INT DEFAULT 0,
  lastAccessedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX reportType_idx (reportType),
  INDEX reviewStatus_idx (reviewStatus),
  INDEX publicationStatus_idx (publicationStatus),

)
